build.beforeDevCommand: npx esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --format=esm --platform=browser && cp src/styles.css dist/ && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css dist/
build.beforeBuildCommand: npx esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --format=esm --platform=browser && cp src/styles.css dist/ && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css dist/
